task_completion.description: Create the required layers with specified colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD layer list panel, verify the existence of four layers: 'STRUCTURE' (Red), 'PINS' (Yellow), 'PLATFORM' (Cyan), and 'DIMENSIONS' (White).

task_completion.description: Start the drawing at the origin (0,0)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The base of the scissor lift structure should align with the red crosshair indicating the (0,0) origin point on the LibreCAD grid.

task_completion.description: Draft the double-stage scissor lift structure
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two stacked 'X' shapes representing the double-stage scissor arms should be visible in the drawing area, drawn in red (STRUCTURE layer).

task_completion.description: Include 40mm diameter pivot pins at all joints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Small circles representing pivot pins should be drawn at the intersections (middle) and ends of the scissor arms, drawn in yellow (PINS layer).

task_completion.description: Draft the platform at the top of the lift
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal line or rectangular shape representing the platform should be visible at the top of the upper scissor arms, drawn in cyan (PLATFORM layer).

task_completion.description: Include a vertical dimension indicating total platform height
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vertical dimension line drawn in white (DIMENSIONS layer) spanning from the base to the platform. The dimension text should read approximately 3441 (specifically 3441.46).

task_completion.description: Save the drawing to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog should show the file name 'scissor_lift_study.dxf' being saved in the '~/Documents/LibreCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively clicking tools, entering coordinates in the command line of LibreCAD, or interacting with layer/property panels.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing the execution of Python scripts (e.g., using ezdxf) or other command-line tools to generate the DXF file directly.

integrity.description: The dimension was created using CAD dimension tools, not faked with text
integrity.visual_evidence: The vertical dimension should have standard CAD dimension elements (extension lines, arrows) and not just be a standalone text box placed to look like a dimension.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The theoretical total platform height for a double-stage scissor lift with 3000mm arms at a 35-degree angle is exactly 3441.46mm (Formula: Height = 2 * 3000 * sin(35°)). The VLM should look for a vertical dimension close to this value. The required layers and their colors are: STRUCTURE (Red), PINS (Yellow), PLATFORM (Cyan), and DIMENSIONS (White). Pivot pins must be 40mm in diameter.
